name: emergency-response-system
description: National Emergency Response and Dispatch Coordination Platform

scripts.install:all: cd services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../incident-service && npm install && cd ../dispatch-service && npm install && cd ../analytics-service && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run auth" "npm run incident" "npm run dispatch" "npm run analytics"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "AUTH,INCIDENT,DISPATCH,ANALYTICS" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run auth:dev" "npm run incident:dev" "npm run dispatch:dev" "npm run analytics:dev"
